environment_dependencies.feature_set: provider-neutral slatec-sys declaration inventory; no native provider is selected by this generator
environment_dependencies.semantic_source_snapshot: SLATEC_EVIDENCE_CACHE supplies the separately acquired full-corpus directories cache in a clean worktree; selected source hashes remain the acceptance authority
environment_dependencies.sorting_policy: BTreeMap/BTreeSet ordering for identities, ownership rows, paths, category counts, and JSON records; generated Markdown and JSON use LF with one terminal newline
environment_dependencies.source_cache: SLATEC_SOURCE_CACHE may supply a verified selected-provider closure but does not replace the full evidence cache
environment_dependencies.target: host-independent generated evidence; no target-specific path or compiler version is serialized

category_summaries.root_cause: The legacy structural writer replaced the reviewed public contract block on every canonical-public routine page.
The legacy writer replaced schema-2.0 semantic documentation and argument inventories with weaker schema-1.0 structural evidence.

representative_semantic_changes.committed_contract: complete-semantic-contract with exact Netlib source, canonical Rust path, argument direction, and a Safety section
representative_semantic_changes.legacy_recomputed_contract: argument_contract_incomplete with unavailable direction and no dedicated Safety section
representative_semantic_changes.resolution: preserve the semantic-review page; prohibit release-readiness from writing canonical-public routine pages
semantic-review generator is the sole owner of both documentation-quality mirrors

representative_semantic_changes.committed_contract: 6,796 public arguments with separable semantics and zero explicit unknowns
representative_semantic_changes.resolution: semantic-review generator is the sole owner of both argument-coverage mirrors

historical_reproduction.resolution: generator regression: remove the overlapping legacy writes, retain the semantic-review schema and public-page contracts, and reject any future ownerless or stale output

output_to_input_ownership.sorting_policy: BTreeMap routine identity and argument order from authoritative ABI metadata

output_to_input_ownership.output_pattern: docs/reference/routines/<secondary>.md, docs/reference/families/**, generated/release-readiness/** excluding semantic mirrors
output_to_input_ownership.sorting_policy: BTreeMap family and routine identity ordering

policy: Transactional freshness diagnostics classify every changed output, but never auto-accept a formatting, ordering, or schema difference. Public semantic contracts and their inventories have one semantic-review owner.
